title: Adaptive beam reconfiguration for load redistribution
abstract: Systems, methods, apparatuses, and computer program products for adaptive beam reconfiguration for load redistribution among neighboring cells or units are provided. One method may include receiving or retrieving load statistics for one or more distributed units, evaluating the load statistics to identify at least one highly loaded distributed unit from the one or more distributed units, identifying at least one crowded beam in the at least one highly loaded distributed unit, and triggering the at least one highly loaded distributed unit to deactivate the at least one crowded beam.
